headline: How Investors May Respond To Charles Schwab (SCHW) Teen Accounts With Education-Tied Fractional Share Rewards
summary: In March 2026, The Charles Schwab Corporation launched the Schwab Teen Investor account, a joint brokerage account for 13- to 17-year-olds and their parents that offers no minimums, $0 commissions on online listed equity trades, extensive educational content, and restricted access to higher-risk products. By tying a US$50 fractional-share reward to completion of an online investing course, Schwab is using financial incentives to promote early financial literacy and long-term engagement with...
